title: Non-record: Causal N-gram Logit Blend — Legal, Bug-Free, Null Result at Scale
author: himanshudongre

data.description: Not explicitly stated as used in the submission; omitted.

novel_contributions: Legal reference implementation of a causal n-gram additive-logit blend for eval-time adaptation
Automated legality harness covering the four closure conditions from Issue #1017 and specific prior disallowed PR patterns
Scaling study across six model configurations showing the n-gram blend's improvement collapses on stronger models
Localized delta decomposition tool to attribute gains by context range and document position
Demonstration that the approach is a non-record result and does not scale to SOTA-strength models
